candidates.text: WHAT IS THE MEANING OF CARE?
UM, FOR A PHOTO WE HAVE A RESOLUTION FOR WITH AND SUPPORT OF THEY MAY BE AND THEY'RE, UH ,SEEKING A FAIR CONTRACT.

THE MASSACHUSETTS ASSOCIATION FOR THE BLIND AND VISUALLY IMPAIRED COMMUNITY SERVICES MAB WAS FOUNDED IN 1903 AND HAS LONG CREATED OPPORTUNITIES AND EMPOWERED PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES THROUGH PROGRAMS THAT PROMOTE INDEPEN
WE WANT TO HAVE A RESOLUTION SO WE'LL JUST HAVE A PHOTOGRAPH OF OUR, UH, COLLEAGUES.
SO I WANT TO THANK YOU SO MUCH AND I WISH YOU, UH, ALL THE BEST IN YOUR CONTRACT NEGOTIATIONS AND A SPEEDY RESOLUTION.
UH, TODAY I HAVE THE HONOR OF PRESENTING, UH, TWO RESOLUTIONS TO TWO INCREDIBLE INDIVIDUALS THAT HAVE MADE A DIFFERENCE IN THE LIVES OF COUNTLESS GIRLS INVOLVED IN YOUTH SPORTS HERE IN BOSTON.
UM I AM PRESENTING THIS RESOLUTION ON BEHALF OF DISTRICT ONE CITY COUNCILOR GABRIELLE COLLETTA ZAPATOS UH, CURRENTLY OUT ON MATERNITY LEAVE.
UM EXCEPT RIGHT NOW WE'RE OUR FAVORITE IS EAST BOSTON HIGH.
IT IS NOW MY PLEASURE TO ALSO INTRODUCE UM ALL BEFORE WE DO HAVE A RESOLUTION.
NOW ON TO THE FIRST ORDER OF BUSINESS WHICH IS THE APPROVAL OF THE MINUTES FROM THE MEETING OF JUNE 24TH, 2026 .
THE MINUTES OF THE JUNE 24TH MEETING ARE APPROVED.
FAN OF ALL THEIR EFFORTS AND, UH, THANK YOU TO THE CHAIR FOR PUSHING FORWARD FOR A VOTE TODAY.
VIOLATION AS FAR AS I'M CONCERNED.
ALL IN FAVOR SAY I ALL OPPOSED.
WHALEN PLEASE UH THE CHAIR COUNCILOR MURPHY AND FRANCISCO SUSPENSION OF THE RULES ADOPTION OF DOCKET 1346.
THROUGH A CRITICAL PART OF OUR CITY THE CRITICAL PART OF OUR EDUCATION THERE ARE UNSUNG HEROES AS FAR AS I'M CONCERNED ALONG WITH THE CROSSING GUARDS AS I MENTIONED EARLIER.
